allow: Bash(node -e "const d=require\('fs'\).readFileSync\(0,'utf8'\); const j=JSON.parse\(d\); console.log\('Albums:', j.resultCount\); j.results.forEach\(a => console.log\(' ', a.collectionId, '|', a.collectionName, '|', a.artistName, '|', a.trackCount, 'tracks |', a.artworkUrl100\)\)")

Bash(node -e "const d=require\('fs'\).readFileSync\(0,'utf8'\); const j=JSON.parse\(d\); console.log\('Artists:', j.resultCount\); j.results.forEach\(a => console.log\(' ', a.artistId, '|', a.artistName, '|', a.primaryGenreName\)\)")

Bash(node -e "const d=require\('fs'\).readFileSync\(0,'utf8'\); const j=JSON.parse\(d\); console.log\('Movie search:', j.resultCount\); j.results.forEach\(a => console.log\(' ', a.collectionId, '|', a.collectionName, '|', a.artistName, '|', a.trackCount, 'tracks'\)\)")

Bash(node -e "const d=require\('fs'\).readFileSync\(0,'utf8'\); const j=JSON.parse\(d\); j.results.forEach\(\(r,i\) => { if\(r.wrapperType==='track'\) console.log\(r.trackNumber, '|', r.trackName, '|', r.artistName, '|', Math.floor\(r.trackTimeMillis/1000\)+'s', '|', r.artworkUrl100\) }\)")

Bash(node -e "const d=require\('fs'\).readFileSync\(0,'utf8'\); const j=JSON.parse\(d\); j.results.forEach\(\(r,i\) => { if\(r.wrapperType==='collection'\) console.log\(r.collectionId, '|', r.collectionName, '|', r.trackCount, 'tracks |', r.releaseDate?.substring\(0,10\)\) }\)")

Bash(node -e "const d=require\('fs'\).readFileSync\('/dev/stdin','utf8'\); const j=JSON.parse\(d\); console.log\('Total:', j.results?.length\); j.results?.slice\(0,15\).forEach\(\(r,i\) => console.log\(i+1, r.title\)\)")

Bash(node -e "const YouTube = require\('youtube-sr'\).default; YouTube.search\('pop hits 2025 music', { limit: 5, type: 'video' }\).then\(r => console.log\(JSON.stringify\(r.length\)\)\).catch\(e => console.error\('ERROR:', e.message\)\)")
